expectations.evidence: Step 1 explicitly lists all 9 coding-rules documents read from '.claude/try-claude/references/coding-rules/' with key rules extracted: typescript.md, naming.md, code-style.md, folder-structure.md, comments.md, git.md, testing.md, package-manager.md, completion.md.

expectations.text: Detects framework or identifies Base TypeScript
expectations.evidence: Step 2 states: 'No package.json was found in the repository root' and 'we assume Base TypeScript as the framework target.'

expectations.text: Maps coding rules to ESLint rules
expectations.evidence: Step 4 Group 1 provides a detailed 14-row ESLint rule mapping table with source tracing: @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any from typescript.md, no-restricted-syntax (FunctionDeclaration) from code-style.md, simple-import-sort/imports from folder-structure.md, jsdoc/require-jsdoc from comments.md, etc.

eval_feedback.overall: All assertions passed. The with_skill run produced a well-structured 6-step simulation with comprehensive rule mapping, framework detection, per-group approval, and guardrails documentation.
